case_title: GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR, INC. VS. MUNCHARY INC. DBA MUNCHARY SF

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFEMDAMT ON 3/27/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNCHERY INC. DBA MUNCHERY SF $4,258.16 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,323.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,258.16 FILED BY GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MUNCHERY INC. DBA MUNCHERY SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MUNCHERY INC. DBA MUNCHERY SF
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUNCHERY INC. DBA MUNCHERY SF
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BY NADER CHEHADE (GENERAL MANAGER) ON BEHALF OF GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR INC FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR, INC.
